title: BannedWordsMute
description: BannedWordsMute is a plugin for Minecraft (Spigot/Paper) that automatically mutes players for banned words in chat. Works only with LiteBans!
body:
# 🛡️ BannedWordsMute

**BannedWordsMute** is a lightweight yet flexible plugin to automatically block chat of players using banned words.  
It fully integrates with **[LiteBans](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/litebans.3715/)** and supports multi-language, staff notifications, and violation logging.

---

## 🔧 Features
- 🔇 **Automatic muting** when players use banned words
- 🔌 Seamless **LiteBans** integration
- 🌍 **Multilanguage support** (`en.yml`, `ru.yml`)
- 🛠 **Custom reload command**: `/bwmute reload`
- 📁 **Violation logging** to `logs/violations`
- 🧠 Supports **Folia** and regular servers

---

## 📁 Configuration Files
- `config.yml` – plugin settings, language selection, mute duration
- `banned-words.yml` – list of blocked words
- `languages/en.yml` and `languages/ru.yml` – message translations

---

## ✅ Requirements
- Java **17+**
- Minecraft server: **Spigot / Paper / Folia 1.21+**
- Installed and active **LiteBans plugin**

---

## 🧩 Installation
1. Place `BannedWordsMute.jar` into your `/plugins` folder
2. Start the server
3. Edit `banned-words.yml`, `config.yml`, and language files if needed
4. Done!

---

## 📬 Feedback & Support
If you discover a bug or want to suggest a feature, feel free to:
- Open an issue here on CurseForge
- Or contact me directly on Discord 😊
